activities_projects.title: Identify Political Parties
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of political parties
steps: Write the definition of a political party
List three political parties in India
Write one function of each party
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand what a political party is

activities_projects.title: Components of Political Party
activities_projects.objective: Learn the three components of a political party
steps: Read about leaders, active members and followers
Draw a diagram showing these components
Explain the role of each component
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the structure of a political party

activities_projects.title: Functions of Political Parties Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the major functions of political parties
steps: List the main functions of political parties
Write each function on chart paper
Add examples for each function
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how parties function in democracy

activities_projects.title: Party System Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Learn about one-party, two-party and multi-party systems
steps: Write the meaning of each party system
Give one example country for each system
Compare the advantages of each system

activities_projects.title: National Parties Research
activities_projects.objective: Identify national political parties of India
steps: List the national parties mentioned in the chapter
Write the year of formation of each party
Mention their key ideologies
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about major national parties

activities_projects.title: State Parties Identification
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of state parties
steps: Write the criteria for a state party
List five examples of state parties
Mention the states where they are active

activities_projects.title: Challenges to Political Parties
activities_projects.objective: Identify problems faced by political parties
steps: List the four challenges mentioned in the chapter
Explain each challenge in 2–3 sentences
Give one real-life example if possible
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand issues in democratic politics

activities_projects.title: Role of Opposition
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of opposition parties
steps: Define opposition party
Write three roles played by opposition
Give one example from recent news
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the importance of opposition in democracy

activities_projects.title: Political Party Poster
steps: Choose one political party
Create a poster showing its ideology and symbol
Write three important policies of that party

activities_projects.title: Political Party Reform Debate
activities_projects.objective: Discuss reforms needed in political parties
steps: List three reforms suggested in the chapter
Write arguments supporting these reforms
Present your ideas in class discussion
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking about democracy
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of ideas and participation (10 marks)
